issues.title: Missing Section ID on Testimonials (All Themes)
issues.description: Testimonials <section> elements missing id='testimonials' attribute. Prevents navigation, breaks anchor links, affects SEO and accessibility.
issues.fix: Add id='testimonials' to the <section> element in all 6 Testimonials components

issues.title: Missing Testimonials Nav Link
issues.description: Only 5 nav items (About, Experience, Projects, Skills, Contact) but page has 7 sections. Testimonials section exists but not in navigation.
issues.fix: Add { label: 'Testimonials', href: '#testimonials' } to NAV_ITEMS array in Header.tsx

issues.title: Missing Image Alt Text
issues.description: Project and company logo images may not have meaningful alt text. Violates WCAG 2.1 Level A (1.1.1 Non-text Content).
issues.fix: Audit all <Image> components and ensure alt attributes are descriptive and meaningful

issues.title: Gallery Theme Modal Accessibility Issues
issues.description: Modal dialog missing focus management, ARIA attributes, and Escape key handler. Not keyboard accessible.
issues.fix: Add focus trap, ARIA attributes (aria-modal, aria-labelledby), and Escape key handler to modal

issues.title: Project Image Filename Inconsistencies
issues.description: Projects reference alias/duplicate filenames instead of canonical source-controlled names. taskflow.png is copy of taskflow-calendar.png, mnist.png is copy of fast-mnist-nn.png.
issues.fix: Update projects.ts to reference canonical filenames: taskflow-calendar.png and fast-mnist-nn.png, or remove duplicates

issues.title: Font Loading Warnings in Offline Environment
issues.description: Google Fonts requests fail in sandboxed environment. Affects: Bebas Neue, Cormorant Garamond, Instrument Serif, Orbitron, JetBrains Mono. System fonts fallback correctly.
issues.fix: No fix needed - fonts load normally in production with network access

issues.title: Taskflow Project Image Reference Mismatch
issues.description: Project 'Taskflow Calendar' references /images/projects/taskflow.png but source-controlled name is taskflow-calendar.png. File exists as duplicate/alias.
issues.fix: Change line 159 to reference 'taskflow-calendar.png' or remove taskflow.png alias

issues.title: Fast MNIST Neural Network Image Reference Mismatch
issues.description: Project 'Fast MNIST Neural Network' references /images/projects/mnist.png but source-controlled name is fast-mnist-nn.png. File exists as duplicate/alias.
issues.fix: Change line 188 to reference 'fast-mnist-nn.png' or remove mnist.png alias

issues.title: Responsive Design Test Coverage Gap
issues.description: Test suite doesn't explicitly test all responsive breakpoints (xs, sm, md, lg, xl). Only tests default and mobile viewports.
issues.fix: Add responsive breakpoint tests for 320px, 480px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px viewports

issues.title: No Actual Contact Form
issues.description: Contact section shows email link and location but no form fields (name, email, message). Only displays mailto link.
issues.fix: Optional - either add contact form or document that email-only contact is intentional

issues.title: Gallery Project Card Tilt Effect SSR Disabled
issues.description: Tilt component imported with ssr:false. May cause hydration mismatch but has fallback UI.
issues.fix: Add suppressHydrationWarning or ensure fallback matches server-rendered output

issues.title: Neon Cyber Font Imports May Fail Offline
issues.description: Inline Google Font imports for Orbitron and JetBrains Mono in component. Fails in offline/sandboxed environments.
issues.fix: Move font imports to layout.tsx or use system font fallbacks

issues.title: Paper & Ink Column Layout Responsiveness
issues.description: CSS column-count: 2 with media query. Should work but worth testing on actual mobile devices.
issues.fix: Test on real mobile devices (375px, 480px widths)

issues.title: No Keyboard Shortcut for Theme Switcher
issues.description: Theme switcher requires mouse click. No keyboard shortcut (e.g., Alt+T) to toggle themes.
issues.fix: Optional - add keyboard shortcut support

issues.title: Theme Persistence Not Explicitly Tested
issues.description: No test verifies theme persists across page reloads. next-themes should handle it, but not explicitly tested.
issues.fix: Add test: switch theme, reload page, verify theme is still active

issues.title: Resume Link Uses Relative Path
issues.description: Resume URL is '/resume.pdf' (relative). When deployed to subdirectory, link may break.
issues.fix: Verify resume path is correct for deployment (may need basePath adjustment)

issues.title: Paper & Ink Year Hardcoded in Footer
issues.description: Footer uses new Date().getFullYear() which is fine, but other themes may use hardcoded year.
issues.fix: Verify all themes use dynamic year calculation

issues.title: Comprehensive Test Has API Issues
issues.description: Test uses isAttached() method which doesn't exist in latest Playwright. Fixed to use expect().toBeAttached().
issues.fix: Already corrected in provided test file

issues.title: Mobile Menu Button Accessibility
issues.description: Mobile menu button has aria-label and aria-expanded. Good, but could be more descriptive.
issues.fix: Consider more specific aria-label (e.g., 'Toggle navigation menu')

issues.title: Only One Education Entry
issues.description: Only Miami University in education array. Appears intentional (one school attended), but worth noting.
issues.fix: This appears intentional - only one school, so correct

issues.title: Limited Testimonials (Only 2)
issues.description: Only 2 testimonials provided (Randall Vollen, Shree Chaturvedi). Works but may benefit from 3-5 testimonials.
issues.fix: Optional - add more LinkedIn recommendations if available

issues.title: No Scroll-to-Top Button
issues.description: Long pages (especially with testimonials not in nav) would benefit from floating scroll-to-top button.
issues.fix: Optional - add floating 'Back to Top' button

issues.title: No Performance/Bundle Size Test
issues.description: Test suite doesn't measure page load times, bundle size, or performance metrics.
issues.fix: Optional - add Lighthouse or Web Vitals tests

issues.title: Missing Theme Feature Documentation
issues.description: README exists but doesn't document theme-specific features or how to add new themes.
issues.fix: Add theme architecture documentation to README

summary.notes: Portfolio is well-structured with comprehensive theme implementation. Two critical issues blocking production: missing testimonials section ID and missing nav link. All issues documented in QA-FINDINGS.md
